Description: beautiful sunset view of the Hungarian Parliament Building on the Danube River, I picked this location because it is one of Europe's most famous landmarks and has beautiful architecture.

A peaceful view of UzungĂ¶l with its famous mosque, surrounded by lush green mountains and a calm reflective lake. I chose this place because i went there and saw it's natural beauty and relaxing atmosphere.

A  mid-air shot shows a cliff diver jumping into the sea in the historic coastal city of Akko. I chose this location because it offers adventure along with the beauty of Palestinian seaside heritage and it's a place we're not allowed to enter and enjoy despite it's our homeland

A beautiful ancient temple in Khajuraho, India, known for its detailed stone carvings and historic architecture. I chose this place because it reflects India’s rich history and stunning traditional design.

A stunning view of a turquoise bay in Phuket filled with boats and surrounded by dramatic cliffs. I chose this place because I dream of visiting it one day , its crystal-clear water and tropical beauty make it one of my top travel wishes.
A bright tent under the Northern Lights in a frozen field surrounded by mountains. I chose this place because I have always wanted to go there and see the aurora while camping in nature.
A view of the snow-capped Himalayan peaks with Mount Everest soaring above the clouds. I picked this site because it is one of the most beautiful and well-known natural marvels on Earth.
A beautiful view of an island in the Maldives with over-water villas surrounded by clear blue water. I chose this destination because it looks very relaxing.
A street in Chefchaouen, the well-known Blue City of Morocco, with someone walking through its colorful streets. I picked this place because it has a special beauty and lovely blue buildings.

A beautiful view from the Lauterbrunnen Valley in Switzerland, with some lovely houses, green fields, and a big waterfall coming down from the top of the hill. I picked this place because I love green things and I wish to stay in a calm place that is that much peaceful.
